description_long: This storage tank is a vertically oriented, cylindrical vessel with a robust, industrial design. The exterior is primarily white with orange accents along the base, top, and structural supports, giving it a utilitarian yet modern appearance. A prominent access ladder runs vertically along one side, leading up to a capped top with a central pipe or conduit extending upward, suggesting a connection for fluid transfer. The tank features a large, transparent or semi-transparent central chamber, visible through a cutaway section, which appears to contain a dark liquid or substance. The base is wide and circular, providing stability, and there are visible warning markings and symbols near the bottom. A thick, flexible hose or pipe is attached to the top, further indicating its function for storing and transferring liquids or gases.
description: A cylindrical, white and orange storage tank with a visible access ladder, transparent central chamber, and attached hose, designed for industrial liquid or gas storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full access ladder, capped top, and the main cylindrical body with orange base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cutaway section, transparent chamber, and attached hose looping from the top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the open cutaway, the dark liquid inside the chamber, and warning symbols on the base.
description_view_3: Angled side view displaying the transparent chamber, orange accents, and the hose attachment.
